File.role: GitHub profile page rendered at github.com/GatoGodMode

Section.purpose: Identity: CRM/business-solutions developer for construction/solar/roofing, bank- and government-grade integration experience; profile links and badges
Skills pillars: custom CRM platforms, enterprise Zoho development (~100 workflows, Flow, custom payout modules, portals), integrations/APIs/webhooks (banks, permitting), sensitive-data discipline
Two conceptual case studies: multi-tenant solar/construction ops platform; field-operations CRM for installation crews. No client data.
Mermaid flowchart linking the five projects
RawEngine Local AI: vision/math separation, local inference
RawGraded Studio: pre-grading workflow and architecture
RawInvestor: TCG market signals, EV math, local API
RawMarkets: multi-asset terminal, discipline signals, copilot
TheMoun: physical capture workstation, EPIC line
Tech badges, generic stack only: TS/React/Node/Express/Electron/SQLite/MySQL/Zoho/REST-Webhooks/Google Workspace/Ollama/Python/PHP

File.role: Public whitepaper: thesis, pain points, EPIC staged rollout, design principles; excludes engineering/IP internals
Public market research: fragmentation thesis, demand signals (cited), grading economics, comps story

Folder.role: Structural and variable maps only; no other content permitted

Constraints.Rule: Never reveal builds: no ports, env vars, routes, scraper selectors, model wrapper names, npm scripts, BOM/firmware details, or internal folder names.
Repo must remain named GatoGodMode to render as the profile README.
